name: Broccoli Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cauliflower, broccoli, and chopped onion in a large bowl.
2. Add the shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon to the bowl with the vegetables.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, sugar, and vinegar until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the vegetable mixture and stir gently until everything is evenly coated.
5. Serve immediately.
